calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Claim of Exemption Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Investment Retrievers, Inc., A California Corporation
Defendant Melanie Abano INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA LANIE ABANO CABINETS appearing on her own behalf,
Parties sworn and examined.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The Claim of Exemption hearing filed by Defendant is denied.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit order for Court signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jeffrey Fletterick, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, INVESTMENT RETRIEVERS, INC., a California Corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MELANIE ABANO, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA LANIE ABANO CABINETS.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Court states on the record that finds Judgment on the causes of action for Breach of Contract and Common Counts of the Complaint.
Brian O'neil sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $62,703.76
Pre-Judgment Interest at annual rate of 10%: $23,011.30
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $510.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $89,050.06
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Continued To Feb-26-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
